vocabulary.example_sentence: We are learning new words in Starter Unit 1.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在入门第一单元学习新单词。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The starter unit helps us get ready for the course.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 过渡单元帮助我们为课程做好准备。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Read the first section of the textbook carefully.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 仔细阅读课本的第一部分。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Students greet their teacher at the door.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学生们在门口向老师问好。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Each student has a name tag on the desk.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每个学生的课桌上都有姓名牌。

vocabulary.chinese: 另外的；其他的；另外的人（或物）
vocabulary.example_sentence: Some students like football; other students prefer reading.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 有些学生喜欢足球，其他学生更喜欢阅读。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They wave and greet each other every morning.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们每天早上挥手互致问候。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Oh, I forgot my English book at home!
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 哦，我把英语书忘在家里了！

vocabulary.example_sentence: Everyone in the class stands up to greet the teacher.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 全班同学起立向老师问好。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Let's start our English lesson now.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们现在开始上英语课吧。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We had a short conversation in English after class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 下课后我们用英语简短交谈。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Can you spell your name for the class?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你能给全班拼写一下你的名字吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: The school bell rings at eight o'clock.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学校的铃在八点响起。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Helen is a new student in our class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 海伦是我们班的新同学。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Ella sits next to me in the classroom.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 埃拉在教室里坐在我旁边。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Emma can spell her name very quickly.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 埃玛能很快拼出自己的名字。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Peter greets everyone with a smile.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 彼得微笑着向每个人问好。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Mr Brown is our English teacher.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 布朗先生是我们的英语老师。

vocabulary.example_sentence: PRC stands for the People's Republic of China.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: PRC 代表中华人民共和国。

vocabulary.example_sentence: PLA is the abbreviation for the People's Liberation Army.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: PLA 是中国人民解放军的缩写。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Some students tried a VR lesson in the computer room.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 一些同学在电脑室体验了 VR 课程。

vocabulary.example_sentence: WHO works to improve health around the world.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 世界卫生组织致力于改善全球健康。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The UN helps countries work together on big problems.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 联合国帮助各国共同应对重大问题。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Miller is a common family name in English-speaking countries.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: Miller 在英语国家是常见的姓氏。
